_comment: IcAlps custom properties to delete from HubSpot. Reviewed before any Phase F run.
Internal property names (lowercase). Operator confirms names against HubSpot UI before live deletion.
EXCLUDED BY DESIGN — these are the join keys for staging.fct_library_files:
- icalps_company_id (companies)
- icalps_contact_id (contacts) — distinct from companies.icalps_contact_id below
- icalps_deal_id    (deals)
Adding them here without removing first breaks the silver→fct rebuild and
the runner refuses to delete them unless --include-join-keys AND
--library-migration-complete are both passed.
Reconciled 2026-05-13 against extra/ontology_hsproperty_metadata_archive.xlsx.
DELIBERATELY OMITTED from this manifest (would break active write paths):
companies: icalps_sibling_index, icalps_real_domain (sibling pipeline emits them every run)
deals:     icalps_dealforecast, icalps_net_weighted_amount (upsert_opportunity.sql writes them)
DELIBERATELY OMITTED from this manifest (HubSpot built-ins or system properties):
companies: city, zip (HubSpot standards — actively written by upsert_company.sql)
contacts:  hs_state_code (HubSpot internal — API rejects deletion)
PRIOR MANIFEST ENTRIES NOT IN CURRENT XLSX (ontology elected to keep):
companies: icalps_companyphone, icalps_full_address, icalps_address_country
deals:     icalps_netamount_k__, ccicalps_netamount, ccicalps_netweightedamount,
icalps_netweighted_amount__k__, cctest_icalps_netamount
